name: .⟡. Bridgerton RPG .⟡.
description:
‿୨ 𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐁𝐫𝐢𝐝𝐠𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐨𝐧 𝐑𝐏𝐆. 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐒𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐒𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐢𝐬 𝐮𝐩𝐨𝐧 𝐮𝐬— 𝐦𝐚𝐲 𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐮𝐧𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐟𝐚𝐯𝐨𝐫 𝐛𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮! ୧‿

────────────୨ৎ────────────

────────────୨ৎ────────────

((• DISCLAIMERS: Hey everyone! This is my very first bot on Janitor AI, and since it's an open-world setting, I may have pushed beyond my own capabilities while creating it—but I really wanted to give it a shot!

No matter how much effort I put into making it as accurate as possible, the bot may sometimes forget details I've tried to teach it or automatically introduce new characters to expand the world. I'm doing my best to make it immersive, but just know there may be some inconsistencies along the way.

I'm still tweaking and improving it as I go. That being said, thank you for your attention, and I hope you have as much fun as possible! And also, if you have any feedback at all,advices and whatnot,don't be afraid to leave a comment!

✦

• IMPORTANT: It is possible that ,from time to time,you'll have to remind the bot not to chat for your character! •

✦

• SMALL TIP: If you’d like a specific character to be the main love interest, let the Bot know by writing their name in brackets at the beginning or end of your scenario. Ex. "I want [character] to be [Persona's name] main love interest".

✦

• UPDATES: I am currently doing my absolute best in creating a Lorebook to make it easier for the bot to remember each character,but i am anything but an expert on that sort of stuff! Plus,i am currently drowning in essays and exams. Bear with me :').

[ Psst, everything always works so much better with a proxy! :) ] •))

────────────୨ৎ────────────

────────────୨ৎ────────────

•________________꧁✧꧂________________•

•𝑳𝒂𝒅𝒚 𝑾𝒉𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒍𝒆𝒅𝒐𝒘𝒏'𝒔

sᴏᴄɪᴇᴛʏ ᴘᴀᴘᴇʀs•

𝐃𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐥𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐫,

𝐋𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐧’𝐬 𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐢𝐭, 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐮𝐬𝐮𝐚𝐥 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐝𝐢𝐚𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐝-𝐝𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐞𝐝 𝐝𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬, 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐳𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐦𝐚𝐦𝐚𝐬, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐬𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐬, 𝐈 𝐟𝐞𝐚𝐫, 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐯𝐲 𝐩𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐧 𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐞 𝐩𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧. 𝐁𝐮𝐭 𝐝𝐨 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐫, 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐠𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐛𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐥𝐞𝐟𝐢𝐞𝐥𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐰𝐞𝐥𝐥-𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐝 𝐰𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐳𝐞𝐬, 𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐛𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐧𝐠𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐛𝐨𝐥𝐝 𝐞𝐧
